startups.name: llm-cost-rollup-action
startups.description: GitHub Action that reads OTel GenAI cost-annotated spans from a workflow artifact, aggregates spend by (date, provider, model), posts a Markdown summary as a PR comment, optionally fails the run when total spend > USD budget. Composes with otel-genai-rollup and llm-cost-budget-operator.

startups.name: agent-card-fleet-summary-action
startups.description: GitHub Action wrapping agent-card-fleet-summary. Walks a dir of AgentCards, surfaces governance gaps (autonomous-without-IRU, destructive-on-non-autonomous, etc.), posts Markdown PR comment, fails on high findings. Sibling of llm-cost-rollup-action.

startups.name: otel-genai-diff-action
startups.description: PR gate for OTel GenAI rollup cost/token jumps — diffs HEAD vs base.sha via otel-genai-diff with configurable threshold, posts PR comment with cost-delta. Fifth and final in the per-protocol diff Action quintet (quintet complete).

startups.name: ai-ads-agent

startups.name: cogster

startups.name: otel-genai-diff
startups.description: Diff two otel-genai-rollup outputs (per OTel GenAI semconv). Flag model added/removed, cost or token jumps > 10%, span volume shifts, currency changes. CI gate for GenAI FinOps. Makes the diff family a quintet.

startups.name: otel-genai-rollup
startups.description: Aggregate cost-annotated OpenTelemetry GenAI spans into daily, per-(provider, model) rollups. Emits JSON, Markdown, or a Kubernetes ConfigMap manifest that llm-cost-budget-operator consumes — closes the GenAI FinOps pipeline. Library + CLI.
